root: ^Valerie barely has time to remove her coat before someone starts ringing the doorbell

^Valerie leads them into the bedroom and slowly removes her shirt, sitting on the bed
^From what I understand you're looking for couples toys, why don't I let you sample some of the ones we sell?
^As the couple both remove their clothes, Valerie signals them to come closer
^The woman settles on the bed as Valerie passes a hand around her back, while the man removes his underwear, revealing his throbbing manhood
^Valerie moves her hand to a toy on her left, her hand grabbing a vibrator while raising her leg, inviting the man in front of her
^Valerie starts to caress the girl, feeling her dampness, before sliding a finger inside her, finger thrusting next to the toy inside her
^While kissing her she passes the remote control to the man, who begins to fiddle with the buttons, increasing the intensity of the vibrations
^Valerie runs her hand down the girl's back, following her spine while the vibrations continue pulsing inside her
^The man steps closer, and while Valerie kisses the girl, he moves his tip to Valerie's entrance
^Moving her strong leg behind his back, she slowly pushes him inside her
^The three of them, intertwined, continued sharing this moment until their breathing became hastier, their voices mixing in a melody of pleasure
^And once they reach their climax, Valerie falls flat against the bed,her legs spread and her insides filled, the girl trembling with exhaustion on her side
^I think.. we will take an order. What's that other product you have over there? We might want to try that
^The girl's eyes drift to the harness tangled in the sheets.
^That? I can give you a trial. After all, I can promise your satisfaction guaranteed
^You reached the end of this jam game, you'll now be redirected to the main menu
